title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog
scenario: When a user denies notifications during onboarding and later tries to enable the Notifications toggle in App Settings, a dialog instructing them to go to OS settings should appear.
steps: 2. When prompted for notification permission, deny/do not allow notifications.
3. Complete onboarding and enter the app.
4. Navigate to App Settings > General > Notifications.
5. Attempt to switch the 'Notifications' toggle ON.
expected: A dialog appears stating: "You must go to your OS settings to turn back on Notifications", with Cancel and Go to Settings buttons.
